index.title: Patch Notes

notes.title: D2R Reimagined 3.0.2
notes.content:
Misc

  • Remove locked chests from being spawnable objects and hopefully removing the need for keys to unlock said chests.
  • Fix Hephasto Normal and Hell rune drop tier to high(was low).

UI

  • Updated in game gem table with chaos onyx stats
  • Updated in game rune table to reflect the ber rune change
  • Update in game enchanting information with +2 random warlock skill enchant recipe
  • Added color codes for steam deck and other platforms relying on _profilelv
  • d3m3vilurr added the superscript into base items to easy detect item grade. -inspired by KOR user community,
  • Add custom sprites and rearranged the layout of the 3 DLC tabs.

Cube recipes/crafting

I don't foresee most of the vanilla sunder crafts to be used but they are enabled now. Phys is definitely the outlier of being useful. Now players have a choice of a sunder with a large - self res penalty and a bonus to damage, or a sunder with no res penalty and rolls random affixes (skillers included) but not the inherent bonus included. These recipes will likely get a total overhaul at a later date.

  • Enabled the vanilla sunder recipe but changed it to use the mod specific gems

Monster changes

  • Pack size reduced on Quillrats, Slingers, and Skeleton archers especially in Hell (Act 5 around Shenk and other bottle-necked zones should be lighter in density as a result)
  • Quillrats missile speed given a slight boost
  • Quillrats, Skeletons, Fallens, and Zombies are now more aggressive
  • Monsters in hell now have more scaling attack rating and damage
  • Harold Thorns Aura has been reworked into Holy Freeze
    • Substantial flat slow at 75% multiplier
    • Substantial tick damage at flat 1250 at 0 cold resistance
  • Uber Ancients skills damage increased
  • Uber Ancients elemental convictions to -200 from -130
  • Uber Ancients base minimum resistances to 80
  • Uber Ancients life multiplier down by about 25%

Zombies

  • Adjusted the zombies without chance to add poison to their attacks, they now have chance to add poison to their attacks similar to zombie5.
  • The poison hits harder as the difficulties goes up

Andariel

  • Increased Andy's base spell levels from 1 to 5, bring an antidote
  • Increased Andys base attack poison damage
  • Andy no longer has negative fire res, she now just has 0 fire res until hell at which point she has 66 fire res to match her others

Raven Eye

Truly the bane of all new players. Cold arrow functionally renders most low level characters too slow to react to the lightning fast Talon and other nearby monsters.

  • Swapped Cold Arrow for Fire Arrow
  • Swapped added dmg in nightmare/hell to fire too

Raven Talon

  • Increased Nightmare/Hell added cold damage a bit

Levels

Act 1

Burial Ground

  • Now has more zombies

Catacombs 4

  • Now has Fallen Shamans, Corrupted Rogues, and Afflicted

Moo Moo Farm

  • Adds Betsy the Cow Queen to the paddock with the Cow King
    • She is a copy/paste of the King at the moment until we have time to do some Reimagining of her skills and visuals. There are plans.

Act3

Spider Forest

Made into a proper spider forest. Part of the area and monster tweaking that is ongoing.

  • Now has Spiders + Mosquitos

Spider Cavern

  • Now has Spiders + Mosquitos

Arachnid Lair

  • Now has Spiders + Mosquitos

Prefix/Suffixes

  • Enabled -enemy magic res to roll on large charms
    • Did not enable magic skill damage % until the magic skills of other classes is reviewed
  • Enabled Warlock skill tabs to roll on gloves
  • Enabled +1-3 any Warlock skill to roll on large charms
  • Enabled +2-5 any Warlock skill to roll on amulet/circlets/belts/rings

Class Changes

Druid

Summon Spirit Wolf

  • Petmax changed to lvl instead of blvl (any level vs base levels)

Summon Dire Wolf

  • Petmax changed to lvl instead of blvl (any level vs base levels)

Summon Grizzly

  • Petmax changed to lvl instead of blvl (any level vs base levels)

Warlock

Miasma Chain

  • Delay changed from 32 frames(1.2seconds) to 15 (.6 seconds)

Abyss

  • Delay lowered from 50 frames(2s) to 15 frames(.6s)

Apocalypse

  • Delay lowered from 45 frames(1.8s) to 25 frames(1s)

Sigil Lethargy

Sources of slow have been largely reduced, lowering this to bring it into line.

  • Lowering its movement and attack slowing to 25% to match Decrepify

Demonic Mastery

  • Pet cap is 4
  • Begins at 1 and gains +1 per 8 levels in any combination of Summon Goatman, Summon Defiler, Summon Tainted, and Demonic Mastery

Blood Oath

  • Damage transfer capped to 50%

Summon Goatman

  • Adjusted damage scaling so they benefit from tiered scaling via skill level curve instead of flat linear lvl*2 so they aren't helpless without crushing blow

Summon Tainted

Initial fire penetration was given without too much testing. Scaling it back to within reason.

  • Adjusted fire penetration to 5% + 1% per Demonic Mastery bonus level

Bug Fixes

  • Fix Corpse Fields spawning the wrong monster
  • Fix Sanctuary causing hit recovery
  • Fix Sanctuary pulling enemies towards you
  • Change waypointspanelhd to use a definition instead of a reference due to clients in other languages failing to be the proper color on occasion
  • Fix Summon Dire Wolf max pet count again.
  • Fix Valkyrie Prerequisite to be Slow Missiles instead of Inner Sight
  • Fix Runestar unique magic pierce
  • Fix row layout of monstats.txt for demon pets
  • Fix Chasm Break, Carnage, Tectonic Slam having no leech as this was not intended, it appears a change to missiles broke/fixed something else.
  • Fix A3 merc not using buff spells properly
  • Fix Charged Bolt Sentry showing the wrong skill as a synergy
  • Fix color code on obsolete gems back to red

Item Changes

Sunder Drop Chance Nerfed

  • This was a much larger increase than intended going from 2.1.2 to 3.0.0

Added Orb of Renewal into the game

  • It is essentially a hel + el that leaves your returned item superior.
  • Can drop anywhere a shadow orb can with a slightly higher frequency
    • This includes non-DLC as I didn't want them left out of the new orb. :)
  • Has a 3% chance to drop from Harold enemies (DLC ONLY)

Treasure Class updated for Harolds (DLC ONLY)

  • Much more improved chance for them to drop Jewelry class loot
    • Charms, Rings, Amulets, Infusion Assemblage and Conversion Orbs
  • To keep their Vanilla loot theme, have a higher % Sunder drop rate than other TZ mobs that can drop them.
  • Special Harold only class that gives them a 3% chance to drop the new Orb of Renewal and 1% chance to drop Orb of Shadows in addition to the jewelry class chances.
  • 1% Chance to drop Uber Ancient statue based on act encountered (Follows Act Boss Drops for location)

Summary

  • Uniques: 5 added, 3 removed, 45 modified
  • Sets: 0 added, 0 removed, 1 modified
  • Runewords: 0 added, 0 removed, 0 modified
  • Base Items: 0 added, 0 removed, 0 modified

notes.title: D2R Reimagined 3.0.1
notes.content:
Steam QoL & Mod UI

  • Changed text in character select on top left to "Click if Red"

Hope to find a better way to convey this eventually but for now this should help with people not seeing the "Play" button.

  • Updated version texts to 3.0.1
  • Added both pliers to materials tab for DLC stash tabs

Misc

  • Added some gold value back to skills on class-specifics (not a lot yet.)
  • Added some Void back to gold on drops. (pickup radius is tiny and annoying.)
  • Changed potion base healing to 1/3 instead of 1/4 for HP1 and HP2, and 1/2 instead of 1/3 for HP4
    • Same for MP1, 2, and 4.

Warlock

Demonic Mastery

  • Changed petmax to 1 + 1 per 7 levels up to 4 total demons.

The overall design of Warlock having a small band of 'elite' demons is a theme to stick with instead of giving them just a blanket more amount going forward. After actual playthroughs/testing warlock minions the goal will be to rework or buff the minions to be more respectable in the aforementioned aspect instead of increasing the max further than this.

Summon Goat Demon

  • Base damage in hell increased by 30%

Summon Tainted

  • Tainted Fire Ball explosion radius up to 5 from 4
  • Now receive -2% enemy fire resistance per level of Demonic Mastery, (Self-only, not aura.)

Apocalypse

  • File reference cosmetic change

Itemization and QoL for Sunders

  • Seperated Latent (PreCrafted) Sunders to their own base
  • Added a 3 to 1 (Random element) Sunder Reroll Recipe

Sunders already found will no longer work in recipes, but future Sunder charms will. They can also now drop multiple times in the same game to prevent bricks while using the reroll recipe, they would drop as magic instead of unique before from mobs and the cube.

Uber Ancients Fight Fixed (Warlock DLC Fight/Content Only)

  • Ancients now spawn and use skills and spawn minions properly
  • They now drop their jewels which have been updated (See below)
  • Statues now drop as they do in Vanilla with each boss preferring their specific statue but overlapping a bit with 2 others.
  • TZ Shards added to loot and can now drop from all TZ blue and gold monsters.

Bug Fixes

  • Fix Standard of Heroes placement in stash
  • Fix Warlock pet icons not showing properly
  • Fix missing Chaos Onyx Grabber and Recipes
  • Fix Sunder charm range rolls
  • Fix multiple missing inventory sprites
  • Fix TZ rotation back to 60 minutes
  • Fix Sigil colors not showing on monsters and pets properly where applicable
  • Fix Orb names to universal recognizable orange color.
  • Fix amulet and ring unique reroll recipes to drop at 99 for now until Blizzard fixes plvl column.
  • Fix sound sliders not respecting their individual settings, combat, voice, etc, in multiple instances.
  • Fix Warlock mana potion value being double what it should.

Warlock Items (Uniques and Sets and Bases)

Summary

  • Sets: 0 added, 0 removed, 1 modified
  • Runewords: 0 added, 0 removed, 0 modified

notes.title: Patch Notes - 3.0.0
notes.content:
D2RR 3.0.0 Patch Notes

Support for Warlock DLC + D2R 3.0

DLC Stash Tab Support

The new DLC stash tabs are supported with temporary place holders for mod items and will be fully reworked by Delegus sometime in the future.

Due to new stash tabs having cube integration the cube's overall size was also reduced and fits nicely in the stash tab pages.

Itemization Re-work (Uniques/Sets/Runewords Changes)

https://wiki.d2r-reimagined.com/en/Patch_Notes/D2RR_3_0_0_Item_Changes

New Unique Charm and Jewelry Sprites

See #919 and #923

All Skill Icons Reworked from Scratch

See #944

Item Upgrade System Renamed to Enchantments

Item Upgrade as a name was flawed and confusing. It has been renamed "Enchantments" now.

  • Uber charms and other systems that need upgrades still say "upgrades".

Rarity of Unique Rings, Amulets, Charms, and Jewels Tweaked

The goal here is to reduce the rarity disparity that exists. A good example is the unique grand charm Nightshade had a rarity of 5 and all others were set to 1, so you almost always found Nightshade (this has been reduced to 2). The overall changes to rings means that items like SOJ will be slightly more common. Many chase items were left or reduced to 1 rarity, and adjustments to 1 rarity rings/amulets that did not fit there were bumped up.

The jewel rarities had many at 1, and several at 5 which skewed the rolls. Now there are a handful at 2 and the rest at one. Primarily the elemental jewels that did not have elemental pen are set to rarity 2. Typical facets are left at rarity 1.

Rarity of Set Rings and Amulets

Same thing with the uniques. This primarily affects the set amulets that were rarity 1.

Non Class Skill Changes/Additions

Chance to cast(CTC) skills are relatively underwhelming, or useless, due to missing synergies. Thus many CTC skills were cloned, given new skill curves, and have slightly altered visuals.

  • Winter's Pulse: Cloned Frost nova with a damage curve of 100-150 cold damage per level
    • Visual slightly darker blue than normal Frost Nova
  • Empowering Flame: Cloned Enchant a damage curve of 500-1000 Fire damage per level
  • Storm Shard: Cloned Charged Bolt with a damage curve of 50-100 lightning damage per level and 1 bolts + 1 per level with a cap of 20 bolts
    • A gold/yellow shine added to the bolts
  • Storm Pulse: Cloned Nova with a damage curve of 100-150 lightning damage per level
    • Now uses a red electric nova
  • Blightburst: Cloned Poison Nova with a damage curve of 1000-2000 poison damage over 2 seconds per level
    • Re-colored a murkier green/yellow/brown ish color
  • Spine Piercer: Cloned Bone Spear with a damage curve of 500-1000 Physical damage per level
    • The circles trailing the spear are color shifted to red
  • Star of Bethlehem: Cloned Fist of the Heavens with a damage curve of 2000-5000 lightning damage for the initial hit and 1000-2000 lightning damage for the spawned bolts ( spawns 6 bolts)
  • Hailstorm: Cloned Blizzard damage curve of 1000-2000 Cold damage per level
    • Projectile changed into all ice bolts and is a darker blue
    • Radius increased from 7 -> 10
    • Missile spawn rate increased from 4 -> 2 (less is more)
  • Infernal Orb: Cloned Fireball with a damage curve of 1000-1500 Fire damage per level spawning 3 projectiles
  • Cinderstorm: Cloned Firestorm with a damage curve of 500-1000 fire damage per level
  • Starfall: Cloned Meteor with a damage curve of 500-1000 Fire damage per level
  • Comet: Cloned Meteor with a damage of 500-1000 Cold damage per level
    • Colored blue because chilly
  • Scorchveil: Cloned Firewall with a damage curve of 500-500 fire damage per level
  • Arc: Cloned Chain Lightning with a damage curve of 200-500 lightning damage per level
  • Dust Devils: Cloned Twister with a damage curve of 500-1000 physical damage per level

Class Changes

Amazon

  • Matched Xbow attack frame data to 2HT frames.

Magic Arrow

  • Increased Curve 4 and 5.
  • Added 10% Strafe magic damage synergy.
  • Conversion removed.
  • Added projectile count to tooltip.

Fire Arrow

  • Increased Curve 4 and 5.
  • Decreased synergy to 9% from 12%.
  • Added Meteoric Arrow as synergy.
  • Conversion removed.
  • Added projectile count to tooltip.

Critical Strike

  • 5+1% per level + 1% per every 2 levels post level 25.
    • Base points increase this bonus by 2% per point.

Jab

  • Synergy increased to 10% from 6%.

Cold Arrow

  • Increased Curve 4 and 5.
  • Decreased synergy to 10% from 12%.
  • Added Glacial Orb Arrow as synergy.
  • Conversion removed.
  • Added projectile count to tooltip.

Multiple Shot

  • Guided Arrow synergy returned to default 12% from 9%.
  • Reduced Multiple Shot Arrow/Bolt to 75% from 100% source damage.
    • This basically removes the change I made previously which allowed for ridiculously high elemental damage scaling as enchant has been nerfed. Also knocks out leech multiplier.
  • Removed extra unused calculation left from previous PR.

Dodge & Avoid (Renamed from Dodge)

  • Combined the melee and missile avoid while attacking and standing still into one passive.
  • 5+1% per level + 1% per every 3 levels post level 25.
    • Base points increase this bonus by 2% per point.

Toxic Whirl (Renamed from Power Strike)

  • Spear and Javelin melee strike with a poison AOE swirly effect.
  • Strike deals source damage and poison; missile does not carry source damage.
  • Required level increased to 12.
  • Synergy with Poison and Plague Javelin but no prerequisite.

Poison Javelin

  • Altered synergies to add in Toxic Whirl without changing overall DPS.

Exploding Arrow

  • Increased Curve 4 and 5.
  • Decreased synergy to 8% from 14%.
  • Added Meteoric Arrow as synergy.
  • Removed Multiple Shot prerequisite.
  • Gains 1 additional projectile per 10 base points.

Elemental Covenant (Renamed from Avoid)

Self-only Aura that reduces your maximum elemental resistances and increases your elemental pierce.

  • Requires level 30.
  • Starts at 6% pierce and caps at -102% at base 25 bonus 75 (total 100). Grows 1% per level until 25, then 1% per 2 levels afterwards. Base points increase the bonus by 2% per base point.
    • Level 100 with no base points is only around 65%.
  • -10% All Maximum Resistances starting and grows by -1% with bonus levels up to a max of -35.
    • Base levels decrease to or maintain this penalty at -10%.

Penetrate having the permanent bonus of additional pierce was boring and I wanted to combine dodge and avoid so I needed to dream up something to replace them, this is the result.

Impale

  • Required level increased to 18 from 12.

Lightning Bolt

  • Lightning conversion reduced to 50% from 100%.
  • Added Attack Rating scaling.
  • Lightning also strikes a target when hit (will cast on further out enemies also if the initial is pierced) that does a small AOE after a short delay (0.5 seconds for the cool visuals).
  • Gains 1 additional projectile for 25 hard points in Lightning Fury and Charged Strike.
  • Synergy reduced to 2% from 3% due to rework.
  • Synergy with Lightning Strike, Charged Strike, Lightning Fury.

Freezing Arrow

  • Required level moved to 18 (formerly Ice Arrow).
  • Increased Curve 4 and 5.
  • Decreased synergy to 9% from 12%.
  • Added Glacial Orb Arrow as a synergy.
  • Gains 1 additional projectile per 10 base points.

Guided Arrow

  • Removed Cold Arrow prerequisite.
  • Removed extra formula.

Penetrate

  • Removed elemental pierce.
  • Required level decreased to 12 from 18.

Want to revisit this as an addition to Critical Strike or Pierce eventually and then do something else with 1 of them.

Charged Strike

  • Required level increased to 30 from 18.
  • Prerequisite changed to Lightning Strike only.
  • Lightning Strike, Bolt, and Fury as synergies.
  • Added Attack Rating scaling.
  • Added source damage so it can leech, CB, CTC, OW, etc. on hit more reliably, but missile is still skill lightning damage only.

Want to revisit if needed in the future to potentially alter projectile growth. Left alone for now due to LS buffs.

Plague Javelin

  • Changed prerequisite to Poison Javelin.
  • Added Toxic Whirl synergy and adjusted so damage is unchanged.
  • Removed length growth and made it a flat 6 seconds.

Strafe

  • Added magic damage per level growth and Magic Arrow synergy for the magic damage.

Meteoric Arrow (Renamed from Immolation Arrow)

  • Reworked, now casts Meteor on hit instead of random ground fire thing.
  • Adjusted damage curves for new ability.
  • Adjusted synergy to 8%.
  • Meteor hit deals weapon damage, but the explosion and the fire DoT do not.
  • Meteors will cast multiple times if the arrow pierces enemies.

Titans Covenant (Renamed from Dopplezon/Decoy)

Reworked because Decoy is so buggy. Self-only aura that reduces movement speed, attack speed, and physical damage reduction in exchange for increased global physical damage and crushing blow.

  • Requires level 30.
  • FRW and IAS range of -25% to -50%.
    • Soft points increase (cap -50%).
    • Hard points decrease (can't go under -25%).
  • PDR penalty range of -10% to -25%.
    • Soft points increase the penalty (can't go above -25%).
    • Hard points reduce it (can't go under -10%).
  • Global Damage Bonus is current 5% base with a 1% growth per base level and 1% growth per 2 soft levels excluding base levels. Results in a cap of around 67% global physical damage at level 100 with 25 base points.
  • Gains 1% Crushing Blow per 4 base/soft points to a cap of 25%.

Evade

  • 5+1% per level + 1% per every 3 levels post level 25.
    • Base points increase this bonus by 2% per point.

Fend

Reworked to do an AOE sporadic missile that hits enemies closest to where it spawns from, gives bonus defense in exchange for entirely disabling chance to block if wearing a shield so that while usable with jav/shield it encourages spear use.

  • Required level increased to 30.
  • Grants base 5% defense +1% per level for a second on use and disables block for that duration.
  • Due to the use of slam_state for synergy for missile damage, the character sheet display is correct on idle and inflated on use.
  • Damage synergy lowered to 4% due to the nature of the rework.
  • Spawns around 6-8 missiles on striking.

Glacial Orb Arrow (Renamed from Ice Arrow)

  • Required level moved to 30 (formerly Freezing Arrow).
  • Shoots an arrow that hits an enemy and spawns an orb that then spawns 4 Frost Novae rapidly and randomly around it.
  • Initial shot does weapon damage and carries weapon effects; subsequent novae deal 100% cold converted damage.
  • Adjusted curve for rework.
  • Adjusted synergy to 9% for rework. Synergies are Cold and Freezing Arrow.

Valkyrie

  • Any synergy relying upon Dopplezon (Decoy) are now self-synergies.

Pierce

  • Required level decreased to 24 from 30.
  • 5+1% per level + 1% per every 2 levels post level 25.
    • Base points increase this bonus by 2% per point.

Lightning Strike

  • Required level decreased to 24 from 30.
  • Removed prerequisite.
  • Target jump radius increased to 22 from 20.
  • Added source damage for leech, CB, CTC, OW, etc., but resulting missile is still only skill lightning damage.
  • Adjusted jumps from 3 + 1 per level to 3 + 1 per 5 levels.
  • Increased Curve 4 and 5.
  • Increased synergy to 12% from 11%.
  • Synergy: Charged Strike, Lightning Bolt, Lightning Fury.

Overall damage buff while reducing the level requirement and toning down the travel range; if this skill doesn't see more use then it and CS can be revisited.

Lightning Fury

  • 3 bolts to begin, adds 1 every 4 to a max of 24 instead of 3 + 1 per level with no cap.
  • Target search radius reduced to 12 from 15.
  • Added Attack Rating scaling.
  • Removed Power Strike as synergy due to rework; this also results in a damage nerf as nothing was added in compensation.

If this cripples the skill I will revisit and adjust the damage to bring it back into usability but testing shows that it feels the same in the end game and results in being less instantly OP in the mid to late game.

Assassin

Trap reworks and some pre-req adjustments. Trapsin felt pretty lackluster so I basically went ham and reworked some of her less useful skills into cold traps so she has more elemental variety in her traps.

Fire Blast

  • Increased radius from 5 to 7.
  • Increased damage curve at all stages.
  • Increased synergy from 11% to 20% (synergizes with Wake of Fire Sentry and Flameburst Sentry).
  • Adjusted mana cost so it is cheaper to cast (2 + 0.25/lvl).

Ice Barrage (Renamed from Psychic Hammer)

  • Moved to Trap tree.
  • Works like Fire Blast but gets multiple projectiles and releases a Frost Nova on impact.

Shock Web

  • Removed cast delay.
  • Adjusted spikes synergies so they are all built-in (+1 projectile per base 3 levels).
  • Adjusted mana cost so it is cheaper to cast (2 + 0.25/lvl).
  • Increased damage curve at all stages.
  • Increased synergy from 17% to 20% (synergizes with Charged Bolt Sentry and Lightning Sentry).

Blade Sentinel, Blade Fury, and Blade Shield

  • Moved to Shadow tree.

Charged Bolt Sentry

  • Now shoots much faster.
  • Bolt increases were all baked into the levels instead of synergies (5 bolts + 1 bolt per 5 levels).
  • Increased damage curve at all stages.
  • Increased synergy from 9% to 15% (synergizes with Fire Blast and Flameburst Sentry).
  • Adjusted mana cost so it is cheaper to cast (3 + 0.5/lvl).
  • Now shoots 5 times + 1 per 5 base levels.

Wake of Fire Sentry

  • Fire wave no longer has a scaling per level travel length, now moves faster at all levels.
  • Adjusted mana cost so it is cheaper to cast (3 + 0.5/lvl).
  • Increased damage curve at all stages.
  • Increased synergy from 10% to 20% (synergizes with Fire Blast and Flameburst Sentry).
  • Now shoots 5 times + 1 per 5 base levels.

Weapon Block

  • Changed diminishing return so it starts at 10% block for the first level.
  • Now receives +50 defense baseline + 10 per level.

Snowlash Sentry (Renamed from Cloak of Shadows)

  • Moved to Trap tree, requires Ice Barrage.
  • Shoots 3 ice bolts that can split and ricochet off enemies and walls once.
  • Synergizes with Ice Barrage and Glacial Vortex Sentry.

Lightning Sentry

  • Now shoots a chain lightning projectile instead of a single lightning beam.
  • Chains 10 times.
  • Now shoots 5 times + 1 per 5 base levels.
  • Adjusted mana cost so it is cheaper to cast (6 + 0.5/lvl).
  • Increased damage curve at all stages.
  • Decreased synergy from 18% to 15% (synergizes with Shock Web and Charged Bolt Sentry).

Flameburst Sentry (Renamed from Inferno Sentry)

  • Now shoots a nova of firebolts that seek out nearby enemies.
  • Adjusted mana cost so it is cheaper to cast (6 + 0.5/lvl).
  • Increased damage curve at all stages.
  • Decreased synergy from 18% to 15% (synergizes with Fire Blast and Flameburst Sentry).
  • Now shoots 5 times + 1 per 5 base levels.

Glacial Vortex Sentry (Renamed from Mind Blast)

  • Moved to Trap tree, requires Snowlash Sentry.
  • Launches glacial spikes in a helix (think Blessed Hammers).
  • Synergizes with Ice Barrage and Snowlash Sentry.
  • Now shoots 5 times + 1 per 5 base levels.

Death Sentry

  • Reworked from the ground up, no longer casts lightning and corpse explosion.
  • Now shoots a ring of magic skulls that collapse in on itself.
  • Synergizes with all trap skills.
  • Now shoots 5 times + 1 per 5 base levels.
  • Mana cost changed from 20 at all levels to 10 + 0.5/lvl.

Blade Fury

  • Updated Blade Fury to properly bounce from 1 enemy to another or 1 enemy to a wall and back instead of from 1 enemy to 2 to 4.
  • Blade Fury missile growth is now minimum 2 + 1 every 8 levels starting at level 16.

Shadow Masters

  • Now inherit fire/lightning skill damage and -enemy fire/lightning resist stats.

Fade

Fade prebuff gave you up to 90% curse length reduction and 75% all res. Lowering that to 50% for both.

  • Diminishing returns max for curse reduction and all res changed to 50%.

Barbarian

Unstoppable Force

  • Increased Hit Delay to nerf multi-hit slightly.
  • % Damage per level 16-25 down to 8% from 10%.
  • % Damage per level 26+ down to 11% from 15%.
  • Synergy down to 8% from 10%.

Winter's Gambit

  • Lowered range and search range slightly for a better feel for aiming.
  • Updated base missiles count from 2 to 3.

Chasm Break

  • Reduced life steal efficiency for skill to 10%.
  • Reduced initial weapon damage from 75% to 62%.
  • Character sheet reflects weapon damage alone until synergies are applied on throw.

Carnage

Improved overall feel of the skill as there is a much more immediate impact instead of the 1.5-2s delay from swing to spike re-target and damage dealing. Updated visuals give a much better idea of what the skill is doing and where the damage is coming from, and it just looks even cooler.

  • Tornado is still visual only and spawns on swing.
  • Spikes spawn on weapon swing instead of after tornado animation finishes.
    • Spikes updated visually with red glow to make it much more apparent what the skill is doing.
  • Swing is full weapon damage.
  • Spikes are still half weapon damage.
  • Carnage is no longer able to be used when shapeshifted.
  • Reduced life steal efficiency for skill to 10%.

Battle Orders

BO HP buff stacking with all the other available HP% buffs and the increased life gained through the mod meant it provided an extraordinary amount of life in some cases.

  • HP/Mana/Stamina baseline changed from 35% to 10%.
  • HP/Mana/Stamina per level changed from 3% at all levels to 5% per base level and 1% per soft level.

Iron Skin

  • Defense% baseline changed from 30% to 10%.
  • Defense% per level changed from 10% at all levels to 10% per base level and 3% per soft level.

Natural Resistance

  • Diminishing returns max decreased from 80% to 50%.

Melee Mastery

Melee mastery provides a ton of damage% and attack rating% as well as crit chance. Due to how the diminishing returns formula works, you hit near max crit chance after only a few levels. This change incentivizes Barbarians to put points into it (if you were melee you already did), and limits its full power as an oskill.

  • Crit chance changed from diminishing returns up to 35% to 10% baseline + 1% per base level.

Shout

  • Changed from 100% base Defense and 10%/lvl to 50% base and 5% per level.

Battle Cry

  • Capped lowering enemy damage to 50%.
  • Removed Battle Cry from being castable while shifted.

Tectonic Slam

  • Removed Tectonic Slam from being castable while shifted.
  • Checks AR for missile hits.
  • Life steal added to skill at 10% efficiency.
  • Increased travel speed slightly.
  • Fixed multiple hitting bug (maybe).

War Cry

  • Removed Stun length from War Cry skill description.

Howl

  • Removed initiate frame since missile is so fast it causes it to miss initial target sometimes.

Whirlwind

  • Damage scaling per level increased to 10% from 5%.
  • Synergy increased to 5% from 4%.

Druid

All Elemental Tree Skills

  • Boosted curve 4 and 5 damage by an average 20% or so to facilitate more impactful end game feel of spells.

Lycanthropy

Lycanthropy provided significantly too much HP% from all levels. Adding a few other benefits for putting base levels in Lycanthropy for each shift form too.

  • HP% changed from 20 + 5% per level to: 5% from base levels and 1% from soft levels.

Werewolf

Attack rating% is everywhere and attack rating should be a mechanic you don't forget exists.

  • Baseline HP% lowered from 25% to 10%.
  • Attack rating baseline lowered from 50 to 10.
  • Attack rating gained per level lowered from 15% to 3%.
  • New synergy with Lycanthropy:
    • +1% chance to dodge melee and missile attacks while attacking/standing still per 2 levels.

Werebear

The sheer damage% and defense% this provided was a little silly. For example, at level 50 it provided 805% damage and 540% defense. Now it provides a more reasonable 395% and 225%.

  • Baseline HP% lowered from 75% to 50%.
  • Damage% baseline lowered from 55% to 20%.
  • Damage per level changed from 15% at all levels to 10% per base level and 5% per soft level.
  • Defense% baseline increased from 40% to 50%.
  • Defense% per level changed from 10% at all levels to 5% per base level and 2% per soft level.
  • New synergy with Lycanthropy:
    • +5% Physical damage reduction per 8 levels.

Summon Spirit Wolf

  • Adjusted synergies to accept the cold spells or other summons up to a max of 100 for Zoo viability.
  • Adjusted damage curves to round out the early and end game better.

Summon Dire Wolf

  • Adjusted synergies to accept the fire spells or other summons up to a max of 100 for Zoo viability.
  • Adjusted damage curves to round out the early and end game better.

Summon Grizzly

  • Adjusted synergies to accept the physical shapeshifting spells or other summons up to a max of 100 for Zoo viability.
  • Adjusted damage curves to round out the early and end game better.

Polar Bear

  • New synergy with Lycanthropy:
    • +5% Physical damage reduction per 8 levels.
  • Damage% baseline lowered from 55% to 20%.
  • Damage% per level to 10%.
  • Defense% baseline to 50.
  • Defense% per level to 5.
  • HP baseline to 50%.

  • AR Check for Missile Hits.
  • Uses Attack Speed Breakpoints.
  • Gains 10% synergy from Maul.
  • Has updated missile.
  • Requires Bear/Polar Bear.

Corpse Field (Renamed from Confuse Curse)

Poison Volley

  • Extra projectiles are now gained through self levels instead of synergies (1 per 6 levels up to a max of 5 projectiles).

Bone Spear

Revives

Buffed their damage quite a bit, but capped them to compensate as they are kinda derpy and just stupid meat shields.

  • Pet maximum is now 5 baseline +1 per 5 base levels.
  • No longer receive bonus life from Skeleton Mastery; now have a baseline 100% bonus life.
  • Now gain 8 base weapon damage per Skeleton Mastery level.
  • Now gain 4 base weapon damage per Revive skill level.

Thorns Aura

  • Flat thorns increased greatly at the 29+ curve.

  • Adjusted Holy Freeze attack rate slow from diminishing returns 25-60 to 5 + 1/lvl with a max of 50.
  • Re-added the minor movement debuff.

Vengeance

  • Reworked so it is based on weapon damage.

  • Spawned projectiles do not.

Holy Shield oskill and visual was fixed for all other classes. Reducing its effectiveness by reducing defense% gained from +soft levels.

  • Defense% per level changed from 15% at all levels to 15% per base level and 3% per soft level.

Conviction

  • Retuned so that its base is 30 + 1 per level until 25, then it gains 1 per 2 levels after.
  • Base points increase -resistance bonus by ~5% per point.
  • Defense reduction spread from 0-100 instead of 40-100.

Charge

  • Animation reverted to vanilla.

Sorceress

Cold Skills

  • Frost Nova: Starting mana cost down to 5 and increase down to 0.7 per level.
  • Ice Blast: Damage curve down for levels 2-23 by 4 per level; damage curve up for levels 29+ by 5 per level.
  • Glacial Spike: Damage curve down for levels 2-23 by 4 per level; damage curve up for levels 29+ by 4 per level.
  • Frozen Orb: Damage curve down for levels 2-23 by 4 per level; damage curve up for levels 29+ by 4 per level.

Lightning Skills

  • Nova: Starting mana cost down to 5 and increase down to 0.7 per level.
  • Damage curve down for levels 2-23 by 2 per level; damage curve up for levels 29+ by 2 per level.

Warlock

  • Added into the mod
  • Icons colorized

Quality of Life (QoL)

  • Improved "Warp" skill translations.

    • Now returns Wirt's Leg after opening the cow portal.

Missiles and Conversion

Fixed tsnova visual and cleaned up missiles.txt and skills that had random etypes or conversion values so if we decide to use physical to magic conversion to combat the leech problem it will be simple to go back and make alterations.

Misc Files

Skill tree updates for prerequisite changes and skill re-ordering, visuals for the two new auras, icons for the new/reworked skills.

  • Replaced Avoid with Dodge (Dodge & Avoid) on items.
  • Replaced Dopplezon (Decoy) with Valkyrie on items.

Charm Weight

  • Fixed automagic, skills properties, and the armor/weapons so that the weight system no longer applies a minimum level requirement of 7 to items.

This also solves the problem with level 6 spells being usable at level 1 and level 12 usable at level 6.

Skill Gold Cost Affect

  • Skills no longer have much effect on the cost, sell price, or repair price of items, with the exception of Teleport, which will still be substantial.

This solves infinite gambling and gives incentive to use charged items more by not being so expensive to repair (with the exception of Teleport). We'll revise gold and make adjustments until it feels good without the infinite gambling.

  • Teleport is unaffected by this change; it will still cost a substantial amount.

Loot piñatas made a bit more deadly.

Dialing back some of the %ele crafts a bit.

Enchantment Changes

Dialing a few key stats back on enchantments.

  • Ring: Flat life/LPK from 50/4 to 30/3; flat mana/MPK from 50/4 to 30/3.
  • Belt: Flat mana/MPK from 50/4 to 30/3; flat life/LPK from 50/4 to 30/3; flat life/mana/defense% from 150/150/100% to 50/50/50%.

    The mana could not be stacked multiple times as there is an itemstat limit per item; also combo affixes shouldn't be that high.

      • Adds 3-14 Weapon Cold Damage
      • Indestructible
      • Level 4 Decrepify (35 Charges)
    • Removed:
      • +1 to Barbarian Skill Levels
      • +10-15 to Maximum Weapon Damage
      • +25% Faster Hit Recovery
      • +25% Faster Run/Walk Speed
      • +3-6% Life stolen per hit
      • +3-6% Mana stolen per hit
      • +50 to Life
      • Attacker Takes Damage of 14

notes.title: Patch Notes - 2.2.0
notes.content:
Support for Warlock DLC + D2R 3.0

This should bring full compatibility with D2R 3.0. We are still working out kinks related to it

Itemization re-work will get its own wiki page or something

see #930

New unique charm and jewelry sprites

see #919
and #923

All skill icons reworked from scratch

see #944

Item upgrade system renamed to Enchantments

Item Upgrade as a name was flawed and confusing. It has been renamed "Enchantments" now.

  • Uber charms and other systems that need upgrades still say upgrades.

Rarity of Unique rings/amulets/charms/jewels tweaked

The goal here is to reduce the rarity disparity that exists. A good example is the unique grand charm Nightshade had a rarity of 5 and all others were set to 1, so you almost always found Nightshade(this has been reduced to 2). The overall changes to rings means that items like SOJ will be slightly more common. Many chase items were left or reduced to 1 rarity, and adjustments to 1 rarity rings/amulets that did not fit there were bumped up.

The jewel rarities had many at 1, and several at 5 which skewed the rolls. now there are a handful at 2 and the rest at one. Primarily the elemental jewels that did not have elemental pen are set to rarity 2. typical facets are left at rarity 1.

  • Unique Rings total rarity decreased from 121 to 95
  • Unique Amulets total rarity decreased from 130 to 108
  • Small charm total rarity decreased from 17 to 10
  • Large charm total rarity decreased from 7 to 6
  • Grand charm total rarity decreased from 10 to 7
  • Unique jewels total rarity decreased from 39 to 25

 

Rarity of set rings and amulets

Same thing with the uniques. This primarily affects the set amulets that were rarity 1.

  • Adjusted the rarity(weighting) of many amulets from 7 to 3 to reduce the overall pick choice down from 80 to 47.
  • Many rings reduced down to 3 rarity. Total rarity reduced from 68 to 45

 

Class Changes

Amazon

Multiple Shot

  • Guided Arrow synergy returned to default 12% from 9%
  • Reduced Multiple Shot Arrow/Bolt to 75% from 100% source damage
    • This basically removes the change I made previously which allowed for ridiculously high elemental damage scaling as enchant has been nerfed. Also knocks out leech multiplier.

 

Assassin

Blade Fury

  • Update Blade Fury to properly bounce from 1 enemy to another or 1 enemy to a wall and back instead of from 1 enemy to 2 to 4.
  • Blade Fury missile growth is now minimum 2 + 1 every 8 levels starting at level 16

 

Shadow Masters

  • Now inherit fire/lightning skill damage and -enemy fire/lightning resist stat

 

Fade

Fade prebuff gave you up to 90% curse length reduction and 75% all res. Lowering that to 50% for both

  • Diminishing returns max for curse reduction and all res changed to 50%

 

Barbarian

Unstoppable Force

  • Increased Hit Delay to nerf multi-hit slightly
  • % Damage per level 16-25 down to 8 from 10
  • % Damager per level 26+ down to 11 from 15
  • Synergy down to 8 from 10.

 

Winter's Gambit

  • Lowered range and search range slightly for a better feel for aiming.
  • Updated base missiles count from 2 to 3.

 

Chasm Break

  • Reduced life steal efficiency for skill to 10%
  • Reduced initial weapon damage from 75% to 62%
  • Character sheet reflects weapon damage alone until synergies are applied on throw.

 

Carnage

Improved overall feel of the skill as there is a much more immediate impact instead of the 1.5-2s delay from swing to spike re-target and damage dealing, updated visuals give a much better idea of what the skill is doing and where the damage is coming from and it just looks even cooler.

  • Tornado is still visual only and spawns on swing
  • Spikes spawn on weapon swing instead of after tornado animation finishes
    • Spikes updated visually with red glow to make it much more apparent what the skill is doing.
  • Swing is full weapon damage
  • Spikes are still half weapon damage
  • Carnage is no longer able to be used when shape shifted
  • Reduced life steal efficiency for skill to 10%

 

Battle orders

BO HP buff stacking with all the other available HP% buffs and the increased life gained through the mod meant it provided an extraordinary amount of life in some cases.

  • HP/Mana/Stamina baseline changed from 35% to 10%
  • HP/Mana/Stamina per level changed from 3% at all levels to 5% per base level and 1% per soft level

 

Iron skin

  • Defense% baseline changed from 30% to 10%
  • Defense% per level changed from 10% at all levels to 10% per base level and 3% per soft level

 

Natural Resistance

  • Diminishing return max decreased from 80 to 50.

 

Melee mastery

Melee mastery provides a ton of damage% and attack rating% as well as crit chance. Due to how the diminishing returns formula works you hit near max crit chance after only a few levels. This change incentivizes barbarians to put points into it(if you were melee you already did), and limits its full power as an oskill.

  • Crit chance changed from diminishing returns up to 35% to 10% baseline +1% per base level

 

Shout

  • Changed from 100 base AC% and 10/lvl to 50 base and 5 per level

 

Battle Cry

  • Capped lowering enemy damage to 50%
  • Removed Battle Cry from castable while shifted

 

Tectonic Slam

  • Removed Tectonic Slam from castable while shifted
  • Checks AR for missile hits
  • Life steal added to skill at 10% efficiency
  • Increased travel speed slightly

Fixed multiple hitting bug (maybe)

 

Wary Cry

  • Removed Stun length from war cry skill description

 

Howl

  • Removed initiate frame since missile is so fast it causes it to miss initial target sometimes

 

Druid

  • Poison changes

 

Lycanthropy

Lycanthropy provided significantly too much HP% from all levels. Adding a few other benefits for putting base levels in lycanthropy for each shift form too.

  • HP% changed from 20+5% per level to: 5% from base levels and 1% from soft levels

 

Werewolf

Attack rating% is everywhere and attack rating should be a mechanic you don't forget exists

  • Baseline HP% lowered from 25% to 10%
  • Attack rating baseline lowered from 50 to 10
  • Attack rating gained per level lowered from 15% to 3%
  • new synergy with lycanthopy:
    • +1% chance to dodge melee and missile attacks while attacking/standing still per 2 levels

 

Werebear

The sheer damage% and defense% this provided was a little silly. For example at level 50 it provided 805% damage and 540% defense. Now it provides a more reasonable 395% and 225%

  • Baseline HP% lowered from 75% to 50%
  • Damage% baseline lowered from 55% to 20%
  • Damage per level changed from 15% at all levels to 10% per base level and 5% per soft level
  • Defense% baseline increased from 40% to 50%
  • Defense% per level changed from 10% at all levels to 5% per base level and 2% per soft level
  • New synergy with lycanthropy:
    • +5% Physical damage reduction per 8 levels

 

Polar Bear

  • New synergy with lycanthropy:
    • +5% Physical damage reduction per 8 levels
  • Damage% baseline lowered from 55% to 20%
  • Damage% per level to 10%
  • Defense% baseline to 50
  • Defense% per level to 5
  • HP baseline to 50%

 

Shockwave is now an attack based skill

  • AR Check for Missile Hits
  • Uses Attack Speed Breakpoints
  • Gains 10% synergy from maul
  • Has updated missile
  • Requires Bear/Polar Bear

 

Necromancer:

  • poison changes

 

Blood Golem

  • changed life after each kill to 3 base + 1 per 3 levels

 

Lifetap

  • changed to 1% leech per base point + 1% per 5 levels

 

Paladin

Thorns Aura:

  • flat thorns increased greatly at the 29+ curve
  • Increased flat amount by 1% per character level

 

Holy Freeze Aura

  • adjusted holy freeze attack rate slow from dm 25-60 to 5+1/lvl with a max of 50

 

Vengeance

  • reworked so it is based on weapon damage
  • does a physical hit and spawns 3 projectiles that circle with a few frames of delay between them adding an additional 25% of weapon damage as fire, cold and lightning
  • Initial hit carries all weapon effects.
  • Spawned projectiles do not.

 

Holy Shield

Holy Shield oskill and visual was fixed for all other classes. reducing its effectiveness by reducing def% gained from +soft levels

  • Defense% per level changed from 15% at all levels to 15% per base level and 3% per soft level

 

Conviction

  • Retuned so that it's base 30 + 1 per level until 25, then it gains 1 per 2 levels after.
  • Base points increase - resistance bonus by 5% ish per point.
  • Defence reduction spread from 0-100 instead of 40-100

 

Sorc

Cold

  • Frost Nova
    • Starting mana cost down to 5 and increase down to 0.7 per level
  • Ice Blast
    • Damage curve down for levels 2-23 by 4 per level.
    • Damage curve up for levels 29+ by 5 per level.
  • Glacial Spike
    • Damage curve down for levels 2-23 by 4 per level.
    • Damage curve up for levels 29+ by 4 per level.
  • Frozen Orb
    • Damage curve down for levels 2-23 by 4 per level.
    • Damage curve up for levels 29+ by 4 per level.

 

Lightning

  • Nova
    • Starting mana cost down to 5 and increase down to 0.7 per level
    • Damage curve down for levels 2-23 by 2 per level.
    • Damage curve up for levels 29+ by 2 per level.

 

Fire

  • Fire Ball
    • Damage curve down for levels 2-23 by 4 per level.
    • Damage curve up for levels 29+ by 4 per level.
  • Firewall
    • Reduced missile overlap introduced in 2.1.0
  • Hydra
    • Damage curve down for levels 2-23 by 2 per level.
    • Damage curve up for levels 29+ by 3 per level.

QoL

  • Improved "Warp" Skill translations
  • Overhaul of zhCN and zhTW translations
  • Added additional text to orb of corruption to make it clear you need to transmute twice
  • Added vanilla cow portal recipe back as an option
  • Reimagined cow portal recipe is still just Wirt's leg
    • now returns Wirt's leg after opening the cow portal
    • You still need the correct wirt's leg for each difficulty
  • Thorns damage now works against ranged attacks instead of just melee
  • XP, MF, Sunder potions increased to 2 minutes up from 30 seconds
  • add staff mods to all assasssin weapons
  • Update the positioning of the beacon and soulstone sprites to fit within the inventory boxes correctly.

 

Charm Weight

  • Fix automagic, skills properties, and the armor and weapons so that the weight system no longer applies a minimum level requirement of 7 to items.

This also solves the problem with level 6 spells useable at level 1 and 12 useable at 6.

 

Skill gold cost affect

  • Skills no longer have much effect on the cost, sell price, or repair price of items, with the exception of Teleport, which will still be substantial.

This solves infinite gambling and gives incentive to use charged items more by not being so expensive to repair, with the exception of teleport. which will still be substantial.

  • Teleport is unaffected by this change, it will still cost a substantial amount.

 

Base item changes

  • Bone knife and mithril point socket count increased from 1 to 2

 

Monster Changes

  • Cows velocity and run speed increased by 60%

Loot piñatas made a bit more deadly

  • All monsters whose drain multiplier was 100% has been reduced to 85% in NM
  • All monsters whose drain multiplier was 76% or higher have had that multiplier reduced to 75% in Hell
  • Mephisto/Duriel/Diablo normalized 100/50/25 across Norm NM Hell, this adds leech to Meph and Diablo in a minor amount for Hell.

 

Cube Recipe changes

  • Uber Unique Stat Reroll Recipe now works with Set items as well

 

Corruption Changes

  • Deadly strike/crushing blow combo corruption on gloves lowered from 10/10 to 5/5
  • Deadly Strike/Crushing blow combo corruption on weapons lowered from 25/25 to 10/10
  • Enhanced damage% corruptions changed from 120 to 50%
  • Extra elemental damage and -enemy res corruptions from 10 to 5%

 

Crafting Changes

Dialing back some of the %ele crafts a bit.

  • Amulet crafted from +2 allskill & 10-15% all ele% dmg to +2 allskill & 10% all ele% dmg
  • Ring craft from +1 allskill & 8-10% to +1 allskill & 5% all ele% dmg
  • Belt craft from +1 allskill & 8-10% to +1 allskill & 5-10% all ele% dmg
  • Fixed crafted gloves all ele% craft - now has its proper range of 5-10% instead of 10-10% all ele% dmg
  • Crafted Gloves from +1 allskills & 20-40 weapon damage & .375 crushing blow/lvl to 1 allskills & 20-40 weapon damage & .125 crushing blow/lvl

 

Enchantment Changes

dialing a few key stats back on upgrades

  • Amulet flat life/lpk from 75/8 to 50/6
  • Amulet flat mana/mpk from 75/8 to 50/6
  • Ring flat life/lpk from 50/4 to 30/3
  • Ring flat mana /mpk from 50/4 to 30/3
  • Belt flat mana/mph from 50/4 to 30/3
  • Belt flat life/lpk from 50/4 to 30/3
  • Belt flat life/mana/def% from 150/150/100% to 50/50/50%

the mana could not be stacked multiple times as there is an itemstat limit per item, also combo affixes shouldnt be that high

  • Boots flat mana/mpk from 50/3 to 30/3
  • Boots flat life/lpk from 50/4 to 30/3
  • Gloves flat mana/mpk from 50/4 to 30/3
  • Gloves flat life/lpk from 50/8 to 30/3
  • Gloves 6% crushing blow to 3%
  • Gloves 6% deadly strike to 3%
  • Gloves 6% open wounds to 3%
  • Helm flat mana/mpk from 50/4 to 30/3
  • Helm flat life/lpk from 50/8 to 30/3
  • Shield flat mana/mpk from 50/3 to 30/3
  • Shield flat life/lpk from 75/8 to 30/3
  • Shield from +2max all res/+3 all res to +1max all res/+3all res
  • Chest flat mana/mpk from 50/4 to 30/3
  • Chest flat life from 75/6 to 30/3
  • Chest % absorb for each element lowered from 4% to 2%
  • Chest +2 max all res/+5 all res to +1max all res/+5 all res
  • Weapon +25% enhanced dmg & 25 attack rating decreased to +15% enhanced damage & 15 attack rating
  • Weapon +50% enhanced dmg & 50 attack rating decreased to +30% enhanced damage & 30 attack rating
  • Weapon +50% enhanced dmg & 50 attack rating & knockback decreased to +30% enhanced damage & 30 attack rating & knockback
  • Weapon +10% open wounds & 50 attack rating removed
  • Weapon +10% crushing blow & 50 attack rating removed
  • Weapon +10% deadly strike & 50 attack rating removed
  • Weapon +4% Fire skill damage & +4% enemy fire res to 2%/2%
  • Weapon +4% Cold skill damage & +4% enemy cold res to 2%/2%
  • Weapon +4% Lightning skill damage & +4% enemy lightning res to 2%/2%
  • Weapon +4% Poison skill damage & +4% enemy poison res to 2%/2%

 

Misc

  • Clone Frost Nova to new CTC Frost Nova skill which has 100-150 damage per skill level
    • Skill cannot be used manually even when set as an oskill (intentional)
  • Update TZ Rota to remove Stony/Trist from A1 and add it to A4, added Tamoe and Outer Cloister to A1 (At 24 zone limit)
  • adjusted +cold/fire/light/poison/magic skills property to use func 3 to fix it sometimes giving the improper value when being set with a range
  • Nightmare res penalty to -60 from -40 so it's half of Hell Penalty
  • Removed restriction limitation from cow king transformation
  • Fix various skills not being flagged for use intown for consistency.

 

Leech Changes

Goal: Bop leech across the nose, while it should sustain in a fight it shouldn't let you stand in the middle of a group of enemies with no defenses and heal through their damage.

  • Norm divisor to 2 from 1
  • NM divisor to 4 from 2
  • Hell divisor to 8 from 3

 

Uniques

removing ed% and flat damage from armors as it caused ed bug

  • removed 5-10 weapon dmg from Reign of Deceit
  • removed .25 max dmg/lvl from Ancients' Epiphany
  • added +2 random pally skill to Ancients' Epiphany
  • Bonemesh unique chains boots changed to myrmidon greaves
  • Thoqqua's Slipper scarabshell boots req level fixed from 19 to 49 as that is the base boots required level
  • Wild Horses myrmidon graves req level fixed from 34 to 65 as that is the base boots required level
  • The King's Heart +rabies lowered to 2-3 and hp% lowered to 10%

 

Uber Charms

  • Removed red text from uber charms

Red text is historically reserved for being unable to use a thing. It was added for flavor but generated too many questions.

 

Splinterfreeze

  • Removed 100% chance to cast level 6 frost nova
  • Added 5% chance to cast level 1 CTC Frost Nova

 

Phys jewels

phys jewels all had %ed and flat damage which caused the ed bug in non weapons. adjustments were made.

Tiger Eye

  • now has 40% Enhanced damage, 10 min, and 20 max weapon damage

 

Jade Facet

  • Now has 10-15 min and 25-30 max weapon damage, and 3-5% open wounds

 

Spinel Facet

  • Now has 40% enhanced damage and +50 Attack Rating

 

Star Facet

  • now has 45-50% enhanced damage, 15% increased attack speed, and 5 all stats

 

poison jewels

removed the small amount of flat poison from the two poison facets

 

Medusa's Gaze -> The Saboteur's Bandolier

Duplicate entry for Medusa's gaze reworked to be a +trap max belt

  • Mithril Coil Elite Belt
  • Requires level 81
  • +1 to max traps
  • +10% Fire Skill Damage
  • +10% Lightning Skill Damage
  • +2 Random Assassin Skill
  • +15-20% Increased Attack Speed
  • Requirements Increased by +50-75%

 

Shadowtrick

giving more of an identity with the unique stat +max traps

  • removed fade oskill
  • removed burst of speed oskill
  • removed shout oskill
  • removed battle order oskill
  • removed warp oskill
  • Added +1-2 to Max Traps
  • Added +10% Fire Skill Damage
  • Added +10% Lightning skill damage
  • Adjust conviction aura roll from 3-4 to 3-5
  • Added incorporeal effect

 

Shadow Dancer

  • Added +1-2 Max Shadow Masters

 

Ragnarok

  • Gotterdamerung renamed to -> Ragnarok
  • reworked to be a spired helm and now provides:
  • +30-60 Weapon Damage
  • +5 Oskill Summon Spirit wolf
  • +5 Oskill Summon Dire Wolf
  • -30% Cold Resistance
  • +level 2-5 Fanaticism Aura when equipped
  • Requirements Increased by 50-100%

 

Judge's Helmet

  • Treachery's Allure renamed -> Judge's Helmet
  • reworked to be an armet and now provides:
  • +1-2 All Skills
  • +30-50% Enhanced Damage
  • +20% chance of open wounds
  • +30-50% damage to demons
  • +20% poison resist
  • -4 to light radius
  • Requirements increased by 50-75%

 

The Gambler's Fallacy

  • Gaiden's Loss renamed -> The Gambler's Fallacy
  • reworked to be a bone visage and now provides:
  • +2 to random class skill levels
  • +0-100% Enhanced damage
  • +0-100 enhanced defense
  • +0-100 attack rating
  • +(-100)-100 magic find
  • +(-30)-30 physical damage reduction
  • +0-10 Vendor Price Reduction
  • Requirements increased by 0-150%

 

Valor song reworked, now has the proper required level for the base and:

  • +1 holy bolt projectile
  • 5% chance to cast level 10 battle orders when struck
  • 25% chance to cast level 20 fist of the heavens when struck
  • 25% chance to cast level 20 blessed hammer when struck
  • 25% chance to cast level 20 holy bolt when struck
  • 5% chance to cast level 1 weaken when struck
  • +2 all skills
  • +2.38 defense/char level
  • 20-30 all res

 

Sets

Tal Rasha's Wrappings

The start of an effort to revisit some vanilla sets and provide some love. For Tal's keeping the theme of providing general elemental damage allowing for a hybrid sorc builds or just useful for any builds. Should now act as a useful mid/early endgame set. A few additional stats were added, the helm now also has some set bonuses.

Full set bonus changes

  • Replenish increased from 10 to 50 (.97/s to 4.8/s)
  • Magic find increased from 65 to 100
  • Defense increased from 150 to 200
  • Removed 50 defense against missiles
  • Added 20% all elemental damage
  • Added -10% to all enemy elemental resist

 

Tal Rasha's Fine-Spun Cloth

  • Mana increased from 30 to 50
  • Dexterity increased from 20 to 30
  • Magic find from 10-20% to 30-40%
  • Now rolls random sorc skill +2
  • 2 set bonus increased from 60 def to 100
  • 3 set bonus increased from 10 fcr to 15

 

Tal Rasha's Adjudication

  • Now rolls +2 random sorc skill
  • 4 set bonus moved to 2 set bonus and increased from 10% to 15% faster cast
  • New 4 set bonus is now 25% magic find

 

Tal Rasha's Lidless Eye

  • Faster cast rate increased from 20 to 25%
  • Energy increased from 10 to 20
  • Fire/light/cold mastery increased from 1-2 to 2-5
  • Added a new 3 set bonus of +1 sorc skills
  • Previous 3/4/5 set bonus of -15 fire/light/cold enemy res combined into full set bonus 20% all elemental pierce

 

Tal Rasha's Guardianship

  • Magic find now rolls 80-100% instead of a flat 88%
  • 2 set bonus increased from 10 to 15% faster cast rate
  • Added a new 4 set bonus of 50 hp

 

Tal Rasha's Horadric Crest

  • Now rolls +3 random sorc skill
  • New 2 set bonus now gives 10% faster hit recovery
  • New 4 set bonus now gives 10% faster hit recovery

 

Treasure hunter

Didn't feel like it had real oomph for being a MF set. Now fills the niche of anyone wanting to mf with the vanilla mf items as a set.

  • Set bonus increased from 25% for 2/3/45 set bonus to 100%
  • Full set bonus increased from 200% to 300% magic find
  • Full set bonus all skills increased from 1 to 3

 

Immortal King

Given a few numerical increases to the items, a few random barb skill rolls, as well as a set specific skill and buff. King's Trinity and King's Charisma

  • On full set receive +1 King's Trinity Oskill

King's Trinity create cold/fire/lightning tornado nova on strike. Initial strike is physical, and each elemental missile is converted from 37% of weapon damage to that element.

  • On full set receive 10% Chance to cast level 1 King's Charisma

King's Charisma provides a flat +1000-2000 cold/fire/lightning damage to attacks

 

immortal King's Will

  • Remove socket rolls
  • Now rolls +2 random barbarian skill
  • Now has a 2 set bonus of +15% Faster Hit Recovery
  • Now has a 4 set bonus of +2 barbarian skills

 

Immortal King's Soul Cage

  • Removed chance to cast level 5 enchant when struck
  • Added an enchant clone with its own unique skill curve: 10% chance to cast level 1 CTC Enchant when struck
    • level 1 CTC Enchant provides 500-1000 Flat fire damage and 100% increase attack rating

 

Immortal King's Detail

  • Added 10-20 Weapon Damage
  • Added +2 random barbarian skill

Immortal King's Forge

  • Added +2 random barbarian skill
  • Removed chance to cast charged bolt when struck
  • Added a charged bolt clone with its own unique skill curve: 20% chance to cast level 3 CTC Charged Bolt

CTC Charged Bolt has a level scaling of 50-100 per level and 5 bolts + 1/lvl

 

Immortal King's Pillar

  • Added +2 random barbarian skill

 

Immortal King's Stone Crusher

  • Removed indestructible
  • Added Ethereal
  • Crushing blow reduced to 15-25% from 35-40%
  • Increased Enhanced damage from 200% to a range of 200-300%
  • Flat damage given for each set bonus stage increased

 

Darkmage's Astral Projection

  • Darkmage's Celestial Fury changed from Sky Spirit to Shako

 

Bug Fixes

  • Fixed Swift Descent Spelling
  • Fixed Tyrial's > Tyrael's Spelling
  • Fixed CB Sentry Synergy Tooltip
  • Fixed Eaglehorn Raven CTC
  • Fixed Dire Wolf to show Fire Damage
  • Fixed A5 Normal Baal Wave 2 minion poison immunity.
  • Fixed missing string for Cain's Gibbet

notes.title: Version 2.1.2 of D2R Reimagined
notes.content:
Skill Changes

  • Frozen Orb synergies reduced to 3% from 4%
  • Blade Fury Ricochet down to 1 from 2
  • Carnage Missiles reduced to 50% weapon damage
  • Inferno Mana Cost Per Second reduced
  • Update poison volley sound
  • Remove Raven swooshy sound

Recipes

Update Barilzar's Mazed Band to also require a rare jewel

Now making it to make rare jewels isn't advised.

Items

Barb Skill Tabs on Items

  • Change from Combat to Mastery & Throwing

    • Fallen Glory

  • Change from Mastery & Throwing to Combat

    • Goreflood
    • Coaldark
    • Skein of Pain
    • The Meat Scraper
    • Bloodtree Stump

Bug Fixes and Translations

  • Fix Firewall Miscasts in small areas, the stairs in Arcane and a few reallllly narrow spots may cause a miscast here or there but it's much much less likely to happen.
  • Fix Chasm Break Tooltip to show scaling damage bonus.
  • Fix annoying splash sound
  • Fix Mail of Askari runeword missing string
  • Fix Akarat's Devotion runeword missing string
  • Fix Francisca and Battle dart missing [X]
  • Fix Missing String "Lilith's Crest"
  • Fix Heroes Welcome missing string.
  • Fix Splash Charm not always dropping like it should.
  • Fix Rain Reimagined disappearing from inventory.
  • Fix multiple rune translations for rune stacks that were generated incorrectly.
  • Fix many Korean localization issues with translations provided by d3m3vilurr and TodayGamez

notes.title: Version 2.1.1 of D2R Reimagined
notes.content:
Splash Charm

  • Added the scaling splash back to the earlier levels because the penalty wasn't balancing it out enough.
  • Fix the cube recipe for splash charm upgrades

Barbarian

Unstoppable Force

Early game scaling was keeping this skill in 1-shot boss territory all the way to the middle of nightmare.

  • Now gains 5% damage per level until 14
  • Now gains 10% damage per level from 15-24
  • Now gains 15% damager per level from 25+
  • Increased delay per hit by 1 frame

Winter's Gambit

The chaos is too chaotic. 🤣 This prevents the skill from targeting things off the screen unless you go directly vertical, and helps a bit with the targeting.

  • Reduced target seek range from 20 yards to 16
  • Reduce synergy from 10% to 8%
  • Fix tooltip to show 75% weapon damage like it should

Chasm break

Whoopsies.

  • Fix broken timing, missile size, damage delays.
  • Fix capping at level 20 with hard points.

Carnage

  • Missile damage reduced by about 25%

Bug Fixes

  • Fix 1H Weapon item upgrade 25% ED / 25 AR to use 5 instead of 10 for upgrade counter.
  • Fix Nef Rune Stack visual only being a single rune.
  • Fixed Countess and Summoner dropping each other's keys.
  • Fix Fortitude runes being added to helm crashing game.
  • Fix Madawcs Fury targeting requiring a nearby corpse on controller.
  • Fix Blade Fury mana cost being double what was intended.
  • Fix backwards strings on splash charm damage.
  • Fix rune translations for krKR to properly indicate stack instead of ash
  • Fix "~Pick Up~" text for all rune stacks and translations.
  • Fix unstacked runes text, #s and pick up translations.
  • Fix a few missing %%'s in .jsons I found.

notes.title: Version 2.1.0 of D2R Reimagined
notes.content:
Itemization Overhaul First Pass

  • Please see PR #802 for detailed information.

Treasure Drops

Vinge went to war with screen clutter

Miscellaneous

  • TP and ID Scrolls will now only drop in Act 1 Normal at half the rate as before.

  • Gold drops now have about 0.2% chance to spawn, roughly, not including probabilities (It's closers to like 0.02 overall but there are a lot of enemies)

  • Gem Cluster added and has about a 3.5% chance to drop when it can (See Below Table)

  • When cubed with bag adds 20-30 Gem credits to bag

    • Can cube up to 99 at once like gems

  • Sunder Charms increase total drop to about 1.5% when they can (See Below Table)

Potions

  • Following the recent potion efficacy rework, potions of each tier will drop for longer before finding the next tier up

  • Players will no longer see potions of previous tiers as they progress through each act and difficulty

  • HP/MP 1 & 2 and Rejuv potions will drop in Normal Acts 1-3

  • HP/MP 2 & 3 and Rejuv potions will drop in Normal Acts 4-5, and Nightmare Acts 1-2

  • HP/MP 3 & 4, and Rejuv potions will drop in Nightmare Acts 3-5

  • HP/MP 5, and Full Rejuv potions will drop in Hell

  • Drop chances decreased significantly from all monsters

  • Players should see much fewer potions overall

Runes

  • Drop chances of runes 1 - 12 (EL - SOL) unchanged

  • Drop chances of runes 13 - 22 (SHAEL - UM) increased slightly

  • Drop chances of runes 23 & 24 (MAL / IST) unchanged

  • Drop chances of runes 25 - 33 (GUL - ZOD) decreased slightly

Keys

  • Can drop as a random drop from unique and otherwise unoccuppied super unique mobs at about 2% chance (See Table Below)

  • Re-roll recipes have been made more expensive:

    • Pandemonium Key + Corruption Orb + TP Tome = Next Key (e.g. Terror -> Hate -> Destruction) (Tome returned full)

    • Pandemonium Key + Corruption Orb + ID Tome = Previous Key (e.g. Terror -> Destruction -> Hate) (Tome returned full)

Orbs

  • Orbs have been changed to prevent them from being force spawned when using the Find Item skill

  • Orbs dropped in Normal difficulty will be unstacked so players know what they do the first time they pick one up

  • Orb of Socketing and Orb of Corruption have about a 3.5% chance to drop when they can (See Below Table)

  • Orb of Shadows has a 0.5% chance to drop when it can (See Below Table)

Jewelry (Treasure Class: Jewelry, Jewels, Gems, Charms, Orbs)

  • Each difficulty now has its own Treasure Class, allowing for scaling drop chances per difficulty:

    • Normal: Jewel 10% chance, Infusion 2% chance, Conversion 1% chance, Assemblage 1% chance

    • Nightmare: Jewel 12% chance, Infusion 2.8% chance, Conversion 1.4% chance, Assemblage 1.4% chance

    • Hell: Jewel 14% chance, Infusion 3.5% chance, Conversion 1.75% chance, Assemblage 1.75% chance

  • Ring drop chance reduced by roughly 3.5% across all difficulties

  • Jewels have been separated from Diamonds and thus given light beams

Chests

  • NoDrop chance decreased from 60 -> 20 (Down to 25% chance of nothing per pick from 55%. They randomly roll 4 times for an item on regular chests)

  • Chest item quality from the best outcomes increased by 1 level

    • Players can now potentially find items from the next Act/Difficulty

      • e.g.: Act 5 (Nightmare) chests now have a chance to drop Act 1 (Hell) items

Champions

  • Now drop Potions that are one tier higher than current Act/Difficulty allows

Cows

  • Drop chances have been reduced slightly across all difficulties

  • Cows will no longer drop Potions

Super Uniques

  • Griswold has updated rarity data and should drop more similar to other super uniques

  • White Council Members no longer drop TZ only loot

Act Bosses

  • All Act Bosses have had their drop chances normalized

    • Andariel:

      • More Equipment

      • Less Jewelry, Jewels, Charms, Gems and Orbs

      • Now also drops gold

    • Duriel, Mephisto, Diablo:

      • Less Equipment
      • More Jewelry, Jewels, Charms, Gems and Orbs

  • Baal:

    • Less Equipment

    • More Jewelry, Jewels, Charms, Gems and Orbs (higher than the others due to time investment)

  • Each Act Boss now drops an orb on kill with the quest active.

Drop Tables

Act Bosses

Parenthesis Indicate Quest Kill Orb Drop

  • Andariel, Duriel (Infusion), Mephisto (Assemblage), Diablo (Conversion), Baal (Corruption)

Key Bosses

Parenthesis Indicate Targetable Key Drop at about 3% (Vanilla is about 1%)

  • Countess (Terror), Summoner (Hate), Nihlathak (Destruction)

Rune Bosses

Parenthesis Indicate Rune Boss Tier

  • Countess (L), Bloodwitch (L), Battlemaiden (L), Hephasto (H), Frozenstein (H)

  • Lower Players = More Runes


Socket Orb "S", Corruption Orb "C", Shadow Orb "E", Gem Cluster "R", All Keys Random "K", Sunder Charms "I"

Act Bosses

Normal      	X
Nightmare     S
Hell  			  S
Normal TZ  	 C
Nightmare TZ  SCI
Hell TZ       SCERI



Key Bosses, Rune Bosses, Boss Lieutenants

Normal        X
Nightmare     X
Hell          X
Normal TZ     C
Nightmare TZ  SCI
Hell TZ       SCERI



Super Uniques, Uniques (Minus Specials Below)

Normal        X
Nightmare     X
Hell          X
Normal TZ     X
Nightmare TZ  SCI
Hell TZ       SCERKI



Champions

Normal        X
Nightmare     X
Hell          X
Normal TZ     X
Nightmare TZ  SCI
Hell TZ       SCI



Blood Raven, Griswold, Smith, Radamant, Council (Gold Name Only), Izual, Cow King

Normal        X
Nightmare     X
Hell          X
Normal TZ     C
Nightmare TZ  SCI
Hell TZ       SCERKI

Countess is no longer the only rune pinata in TZs but she can also drop a key, so fair trade off.


Rune Bosses Max Rune Count TZ Count

L Norm  Thul  2 2
L NM    Ko    2 3
L Hell  Vex   2 3
H Norm  Dol   2 2
H NM    Um    2 3
H Hell  Lo    2 3

General Skills

  • Warp now has a custom icon.

  • Warp tooltip now displays mana cost and cooldown length

  • CtC Enabled across the board for every skill that it works for/makes sense for.

Amazon

Poison Javelin

Reworked into a stronger single target skill late game. Reduced the scaling duration, and adjusted the damage curve.

  • Casting delay removed

  • Duration set to 2 seconds at all levels

  • Synergy upped from 12% to 15%

  • Damage curves reworked at all levels

  • Heavily buffed damage curve past 29+

  • Poison trail velocity increased.

  • Trails moves much faster behind the thrown javelin

  • Poison Trail duration reduced

Plague Javelin

Removed the ability to pierce, as the pierced projectile would spawn a poison cloud that did no damage. Adjust the cloud spread rate and damage to compensate.

  • Removed the ability for Plague Javelin to pierce

  • Plague Cloud expand velocity increased

  • Duration starts at 3 and scales to a max of 6 seconds at level 16

  • Adjusted synergy from 15% to 10% to compensate for the lowered duration

  • Skill description updated to mention the javelin does not pierce

Multiple Shot

  • Based weapon damage scaling to 100% from 75% due to missile scaling problems at high gear levels.

  • Synergy with GA reduced to keep the overall damage at the same value.

Assassin

Charge Duration added to tooltips of skills with charges

Fists of Fire

  • Removed elemental conversion for consistency with other elemental claw attacks.

Blade Fury Reworked

  • Now throws a shuriken using attack speed that bounces to up to 2 nearby enemies (2 bounce limit doesn't scale)

  • Gains 1 projectile per 8 soft skill levels.

  • Carries weapon damage and modifiers

  • Requires Claw or Dagger

    • Doesn't gain bonuses from dual-weilding.

Blade Sentinel

  • Now does 100% weapon damage

  • Damage curves slightly increased

Blade Shield

  • Damage curves slightly increased

Mind Blast

  • Tooltip updated to the correct duration

Death Sentry

  • Tooltip updated to show the correct corpse explosion damage range

Barbarian

Battle Cry

  • Removed curse tag so it stacks with curses

  • Tooltip updated to reflect range

Concentrate reworked into new skill Carnage

  • Can be used with any melee weapon

  • On strike creates a tornado which explodes into small bone spikes

  • Bone spikes seek out nearby enemies

  • 10% Damage synergy with Bash and Berserk

Deadly Treasures

  • Fixed the stats so the skill properly applies past 255/511 limits

  • Scaling adjusted to base 25 + 4% per level MF

  • Scaling adjusted to base 41.25 + 6.6% per level GF

Howl

  • 29+ damage curve increased so late and end game damage is up to par with hell monster difficulty.

  • Synergy increased to 15 from 12 to smooth out early to mid game.

Tectonic Slam

  • Spike Range slightly increased from 14 to 16

  • Damage buff fixed to apply for the duration of the missiles properly

War Cry

  • 29+ damage curve increased so late and end game damage is up to par with hell monster difficulty.

  • Synergy increased 10 to 15 to smooth out early to mid game.

Combat Masteries Tab Renamed -> Masteries and Throwing Skills

Each skill requires a throwing weapon and doesn't use a second throwing weapon though they can be used while dual-wielding.

Unstoppable Force (Replaces Pole-Arm Mastery)

  • Level 1
    • High weapon damage, slow moving projectile that pierces enemies and always hits

Winters Gambit (Replaces Spear-Mastery)

  • Level 12
    • Throws multiple projectiles that travel for a short distance ignoring collision and then home in on random "nearby" enemies and zips to them to deal weapon damage and cold damage
      • Inspired by Storm Crows from Median by Brother Laz

Skill that engages you and rewards positioning, don't hug the monster unless it is alone if you want to hit it.

Chasm Break (Replaces Increased Stamina)

  • Level 24
    • Throw a weapon that appears to teleport into an enemy and causes of rocks to fall on them for a short period dealing periodic weapon damage to enemies nearby the target
      • Credit to ESR celestialray for the missiles.txt entry and Median by Brother Laz for the inspiration from Rock Shower

Madawcs Fury (Replaces Grim Ward)

  • Level 30
    • Enhances player throwing damage
    • Adds flat cold damage to attacks
    • Enhances AR
      • Gives you a cool glow created for the skill.

Druid

Raven

  • Damage curve lowered by 5 at low levels and increased by 5 at skill level 29+

  • No longer useable while in a shifted form

Sorceress

Goal is to pull power out of the masteries and put them into the skills and synergies. Initially started because of various OSkills and Enchant, this initial pass has expanded to feel things out and swing a nerf bat at some outlier skills, and buff up some underperforming or cumbersome ones. Please give each element a try as well as some hybridization, the masteries still provide some power as 1 points, and synergies were cut back to limit them to the skill itself and 2 others and power pushed into the skill level 29+ curve damage instead of bloating the synergies higher. Definitely want a focused elemental build to be stronger, but would like other builds to be viable to at least farm with and have fun doing it.
